name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 12 Jan 2026
body: [{"children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}],"type":"h2"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have introduced some important updates, bug fixes, and enhancements for Neto versions "},{"text":"6.353.0","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"6.354.0","bold":true},{"text":", respectively."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ABILITY TO ADD TARIFF/SURCHARGE ON SHIPMENT ORDERS"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Merchants can now configure “"},{"text":"Landed Cost Surcharge","bold":true},{"text":"” rates on a per-country basis for deliveries to different destinations."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/STOCW618VJTK/shiprate38.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/STOCW618VJTK/shiprate38.png","name":"shiprate38.png","type":"image/png","size":152455,"width":2685,"height":726,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FSTOCW618VJTK%2Fshiprate38.png","active":true,"mediaID":1826,"dateInserted":"2026-01-12T08:29:41+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These surcharges are levied to compensate for import duties imposed by destination countries for incoming shipments."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The surcharge is calculated as a percentage of the product’s subtotal."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A typical use case for this feature is to add a shipping surcharge to cover the cost of import tariffs on US-bound shipments"}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3ZV8SIL6GK84/shiprate40.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3ZV8SIL6GK84/shiprate40.png","name":"shiprate40.png","type":"image/png","size":139710,"width":2688,"height":883,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F3ZV8SIL6GK84%2Fshiprate40.png","active":true,"mediaID":1827,"dateInserted":"2026-01-12T08:30:06+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can also apply default extra rates on non-configured country of origin shipments, e.g., when the COO is not configured for a product or when the COO surcharge is not configured in the rate table."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/841FT1Q8PKZQ/shiprate39.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/841FT1Q8PKZQ/shiprate39.png","name":"shiprate39.png","type":"image/png","size":111617,"width":2680,"height":656,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F841FT1Q8PKZQ%2Fshiprate39.png","active":true,"mediaID":1828,"dateInserted":"2026-01-12T08:30:26+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about delivery charges and the subsequent tools used to configure a complex consignment mechanism, refer to our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1223-add-or-edit-shipping-rates","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Add or Edit Shipping Rates","bold":true}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1047-advanced-shipping-options","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Advanced Shipping Options","bold":true}]},{"text":" articles."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"FIXES AND IMPROVEMENTS "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"We have deprecated and removed the \""},{"text":"OPTIN_EBAY_ORDER_USERS","bold":true},{"text":"\" configuration code from the database to resolve issues that were occurring during eBay order customer creation."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Added a security improvement that allows merchants to generate a new Neto API key while verifying a webhook request, thereby strengthening the overall Neto webhook API security."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which the system was showing a gateway error while recalculating a customer’s account balance with an extensive transaction history."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that caused the “"},{"text":"Sales By SKU","bold":true},{"text":"” to automatically generate a report, which would take several minutes to finish, thus causing an inconvenience to the merchant."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Addressed and resolved an issue where a secondary sitemap was generating several errors on a merchant’s website."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Resolved an issue in which customer details failed to export from Neto to MYOB due to missing customer records."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that was causing the system’s logic on the"},{"text":" My Account","bold":true},{"text":" page to generate a numeric username instead of creating a username from the email part preceding the “"},{"text":"@","bold":true},{"text":"” during customer registration."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Made necessary updates and improvements that strengthen JavaScript dependencies on several Neto applications."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug where users were being redirected back to the registration form after completing the sign-up process with Maropost Identity."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Resolved an issue related to the inconsistent rounding behavior of the cubic shipping import function when set to the default m3 setting."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Improved the "},{"text":"User Visibility","bold":true},{"text":" UI layout section on the "},{"text":"Shipping Option","bold":true},{"text":" page, resulting in a better user experience."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed issues with the multilevel pricing logic that were incorrectly ignoring the \""},{"text":"max qty","bold":true},{"text":"\" price condition and choosing the first matching tier instead of analyzing all tiers to select the one with the lowest price based on quantity and predefined rules."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
